<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Metadata; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class TestDox extends Metadata { /** * @var non-empty-string */ private string $text; /** * @param 0|1 $level * @param non-empty-string $text */ protected function __construct(int $level, string $text) { parent::__construct($level); $this->text = $text; } public function isTestDox(): true { return true; } /** * @return non-empty-string */ public function text(): string { return $this->text; } }
